message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Crapchat user" as user
actor "Another Crapchat user" as anotheruser
participant "Crapchat REST API" as api
participant "Crapchat identity provider" as idp
database "Crapchat storage" as storage

group Search user
    user -> api : HTTP POST request with search query
    api -> idp : HTTP request with search query
    api <-- idp : HTTP response with list of users
    user <-- api : HTTP response with array of users
end

group Send follow request
    user <-- user : Clicks follow button
    user -> api : HTTP request with ID of the user to follow
    api -> storage : SQL insert query
    api <-- storage : Success response
    api -> anotheruser : Notify with follow request
    user <-- api : HTTP OK response
end

group Accept follow request
    anotheruser -> api : HTTP request to accept
    api -> storage : SQL update query
    api <-- storage : Success response
    anotheruser <-- api : HTTP OK response
end

@enduml
```
